height.$description: dimension used by the select component for height.

min-target.$description: dimension used by the select component for min target.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the select component for padding inline.

gap.$description: dimension used by the select component for gap.

radius.$description: dimension used by the select component for radius.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the select component for font size.

indicator-size.$description: dimension used by the select component for indicator size.

border-width.$description: dimension used by the select component for border width.

border-block-start-width.$description: dimension used by the select component for border block start width.

border-block-end-width.$description: dimension used by the select component for border block end width.

border-inline-start-width.$description: dimension used by the select component for border inline start width.

border-inline-end-width.$description: dimension used by the select component for border inline end width.

label-gap.$description: dimension used by the select component for label gap.

label-font-size.$description: dimension used by the select component for label font size.

label-font-weight.$description: font weight used by the select component for label font weight.

label-line-height.$description: dimension used by the select component for label line height.

bg.$description: color used by the select component for rest background.

fg.$description: color used by the select component for rest foreground.

border.$description: color used by the select component for rest border.

label-fg.$description: color used by the select component for rest label foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the select component for hover background.

fg.$description: color used by the select component for hover foreground.

border.$description: color used by the select component for hover border. Brief §1: hover moves along the neutral outline em ramp (Black/12), matching ki-input/ki-textarea; the primary accent outline is the focus language (Focus/primary), not hover.

label-fg.$description: color used by the select component for hover label foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the select component for focus background.

fg.$description: color used by the select component for focus foreground.

border.$description: color used by the select component for focus border.

label-fg.$description: color used by the select component for focus label foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the select component for disabled background.

fg.$description: color used by the select component for disabled foreground.

border.$description: color used by the select component for disabled border.

label-fg.$description: color used by the select component for disabled label foreground.

placeholder-fg.$description: color used by the select component for placeholder foreground.

bg.$description: color used by the select component for listbox background.

radius.$description: dimension used by the select component for listbox radius.

elevation.$description: color used by the select component for listbox elevation. Legacy of the pre-ramp hand-composed listbox shadow, superseded by ki.select.listbox.shadow; kept published because the public-api contract requires deprecation metadata at least one minor before removal.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the select component for the listbox: MarsUI elevation ramp e3 (brief §5), the medium floating-surface level, replacing the former hand-composed offset/color shadow. Declared level: e3 (M3 analog: menu/dialog band; material3 overrides to e2 = md.sys.elevation.level2 for menus).

padding.$description: dimension used by the select component for listbox padding.

max-block-size.$description: dimension used by the select component for listbox max block size (surface size scale; the former ki.space.25xl reference misused the spacing scale).

offset.$description: dimension used by the select component for listbox offset.

color.$description: color used by the select component for focus ring color.

width.$description: dimension used by the select component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the select component for focus ring offset.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the select component for the focus ring glow (MarsUI Focus/primary: 3px spread ring at 40% — specs/002-ki-button/design-extraction.md §2.5, same double mechanism as ki-button: glow plus the opaque indicator).
